title: Karnataka SSLC Social Answer Key 2026:

detail.title: Karnataka SSLC Social Answer Key 2026:
detail.short_info: Karnataka SSLC Social Answer Key 2026 (Unofficial) is available. Check section-wise answers, exam analysis, and calculate your estimated score here.

content.text: The Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB) conducted the SSLC (Class 10) Social Science exam on April 2, 2026. The exam was held from 10:15 AM to 1:30 PM (3 hours 15 minutes). Thousands of students appeared for the exam across various examination centres in Karnataka.

The Karnataka SSLC Social Science Unofficial Answer Key 2026 is prepared by subject experts immediately after the exam. Students can use this answer key to cross-check their responses and calculate their estimated score out of 80 marks in the theory paper.

sections.heading: Karnataka SSLC Social Science 2026 - Exam Highlights

rows: Karnataka School Examination and Assessment Board (KSEAB)

sections.heading: Karnataka SSLC Social Unofficial Answer Key 2026

content.text: Since KSEAB does not release an official answer key immediately after the exam, subject experts prepare an unofficial answer key based on the question paper. This answer key covers all sections of the Social Science paper and is available shortly after the exam concludes. Students are advised to use it only as a reference to estimate their performance.

rows: Karnataka SSLC Social Unofficial Answer Key Youtube 2026
Karnataka SSLC Question and Answer Key 2026

sections.heading: How to Calculate Your Score Using Karnataka SSLC Social Answer Key 2026

content.text: The Karnataka SSLC Social Science theory paper carries 80 marks. Use the marks distribution along with the unofficial answer key to estimate your theory score.
Note: The total exam is 100 marks. The theory paper is 80 marks and the remaining 20 marks are from internal assessment. Students need a minimum of 30% in the theory paper to qualify.

sections.heading: How to Download Karnataka SSLC Social Answer Key 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to download the Karnataka SSLC Social Unofficial Answer Key 2026:

items: Visit the official KSEAB website or a trusted education portal.
Look for the Karnataka SSLC Answer Key 2026 link on the homepage.
Click on the link and select Social Science from the subject list.
The answer key PDF will open on your screen.
Match your answers section-wise and use the marks table above to calculate your score.
